author: Jdthomas24
description: Monitor device check-in health across Zigbee, Z-Wave, Matter, Hub Mesh and LAN — learns each device's normal pattern and alerts you when something goes quiet.
releaseNotes: v1.1.8 — Initial public beta release. EWMA baseline learning with 3-sample minimum. Automatic protocol detection (Zigbee, Z-Wave, Matter, Hub Mesh, LAN). Health scoring: Excellent / Good / Fair / Poor / Offline. Snooze per device with configurable duration and auto-expiry. Mode restriction for notifications. Pushover markup support. Single capability.* device picker. Collapsed settings sections with current value display.
